_meta.title: Channel Ownership Templates — XGM2 Audio Architecture
_meta.purpose: Pre-built channel ownership maps for common game scenarios

bgm_sfx_standard.name: BGM + SFX Standard
bgm_sfx_standard.description: Most common setup. BGM via XGM2 sequencer, SFX on dedicated PCM channel.
bgm_sfx_standard.fallback: If PCM channels exhausted, drop ambient (CH3) first

bgm_sfx_voice.name: BGM + SFX + Voice
bgm_sfx_voice.description: Full setup with dedicated voice channel. For games with announcer, narration, or character speech.
bgm_sfx_voice.fallback: If voice needed during SFX peak, drop ambient. If all 3 busy, voice preempts lowest.

boss_setpiece.name: Boss Setpiece
boss_setpiece.description: Boss encounter with dynamic stingers and high-priority alerts. All channels active.

PSG_NOISE.note: PSG noise for boss roar effect

stinger_plan.boss_intro: BGM fade → stinger (2s) → boss BGM fade in
stinger_plan.boss_death: BGM stop → death stinger → victory BGM

boss_setpiece.fallback: Drop ambient channel first, then reduce SFX to CH1 only

cutscene_cinematic.name: Cutscene / Cinematic
cutscene_cinematic.description: Cinematic sequence with voice narration, stingers, and minimal SFX.

PCM_CH3.note: Not used during cutscene to save CPU

cutscene_cinematic.fallback: Voice has absolute priority. SFX yield to voice if contention.

sfx_only.name: SFX Only (No BGM)
sfx_only.description: Pure SFX mode. For menus, loading, or dramatic silent moments.

PSG_CH1-3.note: PSG driven by 68K for menu beeps

sfx_only.note: XGM2 driver still loaded but no track playing. PCM channels available.

custom_driver_hybrid.name: Custom Z80 Driver + XGM2 Hybrid
custom_driver_hybrid.description: Custom Z80 driver handles specific audio tasks (high-quality voice, echo) while XGM2 manages BGM. Requires careful channel handoff.

FM_CH6_DAC.note: DAC taken by custom driver for hi-fi voice

PCM_CH1-3.note: Custom driver and XGM2 CANNOT run simultaneously on same channel

integration_contract.driver_swap: Must unload XGM2 before loading custom driver (or vice versa)
integration_contract.transition: BGM fade out → driver swap → custom audio → driver swap back → BGM resume
integration_contract.state_preservation: BGM position/state LOST during swap — plan for musical break points

custom_driver_hybrid.fallback: If custom driver fails to load, fall back to XGM2 PCM for degraded but functional audio

invariants: Every channel MUST have exactly one owner at any time
Owner change requires explicit handoff (stop current → assign → start new)
BGM channels owned by XGM2 sequencer — never write directly
PCM channel priority: higher number ALWAYS preempts lower
Ambient channels are ALWAYS the first sacrificed under contention
Voice channel should NEVER be preempted by standard SFX
anti_patterns: Two owners on same channel (race condition → audio corruption)
Ambient at high priority (blocks combat SFX)
Voice without dedicated channel (gets preempted mid-sentence)
No fallback plan (system crashes when all channels busy)
